Back: HDMI + Ethernet + 3x Thunderbolt - **Display:** Supports up to 3 displays - **Thermal:** New cooling architecture — quiet and efficient ### Why a Second Mac mini Makes Sense for A 1. **More agents, same machine** — Current setup runs everything on 1 Mac mini.
